name: ask-aidp
description: Ask and operate Oracle AI Data Platform resources from Codex through aidp-cli and native SDK Git tools.

interface.shortDescription: Ask and operate Oracle AIDP with aidp-cli and SDK Git tools.
interface.longDescription: Ask AIDP exposes Oracle AI Data Platform Workbench operations to Codex through aidp-cli and native TypeScript SDK GitClient tools for workspace Git repository actions that are not covered by the CLI. Git tools can resolve repository keys from Git-backed workspace folder paths through WorkspaceObjectClient#listWorkspaceObjects. It includes a generic CLI runner for all documented CLI commands, a generated CLI command reference, and guided tools for connection checks, N-notebook workflows with commented grouped cells, workspace code upload, Git folders, Git push/pull/status/diff/branch operations, catalog/schema/table creation, CSV table SQL generation with header handling, initial table data loading, run tracking, medallion schemas, bundles, task output export, and log collection.
defaultPrompt: Look up AIDP CLI command reference
